ownership.local_obligation: consume signed official patch releases and review release notes
ownership.surface: CPython source security fixes and CVE response

ownership.local_obligation: verify official identity and enumerate packaging deltas
ownership.surface: Android package production and upstream Android patches

ownership.local_obligation: replay full authority chain for each accepted update
ownership.surface: launcher, RUNPATH, relocation, sysconfig and metadata transformations

ownership.local_obligation: inventory changes and requalify selected surfaces
ownership.surface: bundled dependency versions, wheel and pip policy

ownership.local_obligation: never convert preview evidence into a release or support claim
pin exact provider identities, preserve licenses, and qualify current and rollback products
ownership.surface: versioned CA and timezone provider bytes

ownership.local_obligation: keep data outside the immutable Python tree and preserve atomic verified activation
ownership.surface: data product assembly, activation, rollback and corruption handling

ownership.local_obligation: record exact immutable identities, require explicit reasoned revocation, deny revoked selection, and never infer publication from green tests
ownership.owner: local release operators with independent reviewer
ownership.surface: release catalog support status, emergency revocation and publication decision
